title: Anatomy of a Simple Scatter Plot
description: A visual breakdown of the core components and purpose of a scatter plot used in Exploratory Data Analysis to examine the relationship between two continuous variables.
relationships: The X-Axis and Y-Axis form a Cartesian plane for plotting data
Each Data Point is plotted at the intersection (X value, Y value) of the two variables
The overall pattern of the Data Points reveals the relationship (e.g., positive, negative, no correlation) between the two variables
